requirement_topic.en: PSRC / ENA Grid Connection — 220/380 V, 50 Hz and Project Coordination
requirement_topic.zh: PSRC / ENA并网接入——220/380 V、50 Hz及项目协调
requirement_topic.zht: PSRC / ENA併網接入——220/380 V、50 Hz及項目協調

summary.en: Armenia's EV charging installations must be coordinated with the electricity-sector regulator, PSRC, and the distribution utility, ENA, where the charger is grid-connected or affects site capacity. Armenia is commonly treated as a 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz market. That is close to China's domestic nominal voltage and frequency, but it does not make a China grid-acceptance package transferable. Project owners and installers still need ENA connection conditions, metering and load-capacity review, protection settings, installation approval, commissioning evidence, and any PSRC-supervised requirements applicable to the site or operator.
summary.zh: 亚美尼亚电动汽车充电桩安装在并网或影响场站容量时，须与电力行业监管机构PSRC及配电公用事业ENA协调。亚美尼亚通常按220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz市场处理。该参数接近中国国内标称电压和频率，但并不意味着中国并网验收资料可以转用。项目业主和安装方仍需取得ENA接入条件、计量及负荷容量审查、保护设定、安装批准、调试证据，以及适用于站点或运营方的任何PSRC监管要求。
summary.zht: 亞美尼亞電動汽車充電樁安裝在併網或影響場站容量時，須與電力行業監管機構PSRC及配電公用事業ENA協調。亞美尼亞通常按220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz市場處理。該參數接近中國國內標稱電壓和頻率，但並不意味著中國併網驗收資料可以轉用。項目業主和安裝方仍需取得ENA接入條件、計量及負荷容量審查、保護設定、安裝批准、調試證據，以及適用於站點或運營方的任何PSRC監管要求。

standards_or_laws: PSRC — Public Services Regulatory Commission of the Republic of Armenia electricity-sector requirements
ENA — Electric Networks of Armenia distribution interconnection and installation coordination
IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements
IEC 61000 series — EMC and power-quality evidence where required by project specifications
EAEU TR CU 004/2011 and TR CU 020/2011 for in-scope electrical equipment

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are designed around GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930 communication for DC systems, and local grid-operator project acceptance. China also uses a 220/380 V, 50 Hz nominal low-voltage supply. The shared nominal voltage and frequency reduce re-rating risk, but China local grid acceptance, GB/T documentation, and domestic labels are not PSRC or ENA approvals.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口、直流系统GB/T 27930通信，以及当地电网运营商项目验收。中国低压供电同样采用220/380 V、50 Hz标称参数。相同的标称电压和频率降低了重新定额风险，但中国当地并网验收、GB/T文件和国内标签并非PSRC或ENA批准。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口、直流系統GB/T 27930通訊，以及當地電網運營商項目驗收。中國低壓供電同樣採用220/380 V、50 Hz標稱參數。相同的標稱電壓和頻率降低了重新定額風險，但中國當地併網驗收、GB/T文件和國內標籤並非PSRC或ENA批准。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters should confirm: input-voltage range at 220/380 V, 50 Hz; maximum site demand and transformer capacity; protection and residual-current device requirements; harmonic and conducted-emission evidence; metering and load-management requirements; commissioning documents required by ENA; and whether the product is in scope of EAEU TR CU / EAC before installation. China domestic acceptance documents are useful background but not a substitute for Armenia project coordination.
gap.zh: 出口商应确认：220/380 V、50 Hz输入电压范围；场站最大需量和变压器容量；保护和剩余电流装置要求；谐波和传导发射证据；计量和负载管理要求；ENA要求的调试文件；以及安装前产品是否属于EAEU TR CU / EAC范围。中国国内验收文件可作为背景资料，但不能替代亚美尼亚项目协调。
gap.zht: 出口商應確認：220/380 V、50 Hz輸入電壓範圍；場站最大需量和變壓器容量；保護和剩餘電流裝置要求；諧波和傳導發射證據；計量和負載管理要求；ENA要求的調試文件；以及安裝前產品是否屬於EAEU TR CU / EAC範圍。中國國內驗收文件可作為背景資料，但不能替代亞美尼亞項目協調。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected installations where PSRC / ENA connection, metering, capacity, or commissioning approval applies; requirements are project-specific and must be confirmed with PSRC, ENA, and the site owner
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid acceptance applies domestically and is not transferable to Armenia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Armenia and China share broadly similar 220/380 V, 50 Hz low-voltage assumptions, but a charger still needs PSRC / ENA project coordination, local installation evidence, and EAEU / EAC checks where in scope. Treat Chinese grid-acceptance files as supporting evidence only.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 亚美尼亚和中国在低压侧通常同为220/380 V、50 Hz，但充电桩仍需PSRC / ENA项目协调、当地安装证据，并在范围内完成EAEU / EAC核验。中国并网验收文件只能作为辅助证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 亞美尼亞和中國在低壓側通常同為220/380 V、50 Hz，但充電樁仍需PSRC / ENA項目協調、當地安裝證據，並在範圍內完成EAEU / EAC核驗。中國併網驗收文件只能作為輔助證據。
